_comment: Parity ratchet (C81). These floors must never decrease and rust-only ceilings must never increase. The CI `parity` job runs the #[ignore]d parity tests against the pinned fixtures below and fails if any gate regresses. A PR that intentionally changes parity must re-run `CFN_LINT_UPDATE_RATCHET=1 cargo test --test parity -- --include-ignored --test-threads=1` and commit this file, so every parity movement is an explicit, reviewable diff. min_expected guards against a vacuous pass (fixtures missing => nothing compared => fake 100%).
